title: MCAD: Alternative Dispute Resolution (ADR) — Mediation and Conciliation
description: MCAD page describing three ADR tracks in discrimination cases: voluntary early mediation (post-complaint, pre-determination), mandatory conciliation (post-probable-cause, required by M.G.L. c.151B), and voluntary late mediation (post-discovery). MCAD ADR is free and conducted by full-time attorney mediators.
notes: Conciliation is mandatory under c.151B after a probable-cause finding; all parties/counsel must attend. Continuance motions filed late (1–2 weeks prior) are likely denied. Initial complaint deadline is 300 days (see sub-02-mcad-deadline).
